options.name: --copy-translations
options.description:
If enabled, copy missing translations from other keys with
the same default culture value.

options.name: --exporter
options.description:
The exporters to be used to process the resx
files.

options.name: --only-missing
options.description:
Export only keys that have at least one missing
translation.

options.name: --output
options.description:
Path to the directory where the .resx files will be
exported.

options.name: --path
options.description:
Path to the directory containing the .resx
files.
